title: PII redaction via Presidio REST API
acceptance_criteria: Names, emails, phones, addresses replaced with [EMAIL_1], [PERSON_1], etc.
Placeholder tokens are stable (same input → same replacement)
completion_summary: internal/redact: Presidio /analyze REST client, replaces PII spans with <ENTITY_TYPE> tags using byte-indexed span replacement. Redact() sends text to Presidio, sorts spans descending by Start, replaces in-place. 6 tests pass: empty text, no PII, single entity, multiple entities, Presidio error, overlapping spans.
